evidence_paragraphs.snippet: [Tyrion](wiki:Tyrion_Lannister) has made an agreement with [Ben Plumm](wiki:Ben_Plumm) to join the [Second Sons](wiki:Second_Sons). He signs a number of agreements that he will pay about 50 higher...

After this, he is told to go and find armor for himself and [Penny](wiki:Penny). He returns to where she is sleeping, and there he notices signs that she may have the [bloody flux](wiki:Bloody_flux)....
